seo.title: Building AI Email Assistant with DSPy + Vex Guardrails
seo.description: Learn how to build ai email assistant with DSPy + Vex guardrails. Detect failures, prevent drift, and ensure reliability.

content.intro: Building an AI Email Assistant with DSPy enables programmatic LLM optimization for tasks like intent detection and draft generation, turning prompting into a structured programming paradigm. However, DSPy's optimized modules can overfit to training data or produce chain-of-thought errors that cascade through email workflows. Vex guardrails are essential to verify PII filtering, tone appropriateness, and confidentiality before emails reach real inboxes.

architectureOverview.heading: AI Email Assistant Architecture with DSPy
architectureOverview.description:
The AI Email Assistant processes incoming emails through a DSPy pipeline starting with an IntentClassifier module that detects user goals (reply, forward, draft). This feeds into specialized modules: DraftGenerator for content creation, AttachmentHandler for file analysis, and ToneAdjuster for sentiment optimization. A final ApprovalChain module orchestrates send decisions with human-in-loop validation.

DSPy's optimizer tunes these modules against synthetic email datasets, but without runtime verification, optimized prompts can generate inappropriate tone or leak PII. The pipeline uses dspy.ChainOfThought and custom signatures for structured reasoning.

Vex wraps critical forward() calls to enforce verification at inference time, catching failures before email transmission.

risks.name: PII Leakage in Drafts
risks.description: Optimized DraftGenerator modules extract and include sensitive data (SSNs, emails) from context
risks.mitigation: Vex PII scanner on all generated email content before approval

risks.name: Inappropriate Tone
risks.description: ToneAdjuster produces sarcastic/hostile language due to CoT reasoning errors
risks.mitigation: Vex sentiment analysis with professional tone assertions

risks.name: Invalid Recipients
risks.description: IntentClassifier misdetects forwarding targets, sending to wrong domains
risks.mitigation: Vex recipient domain validation against approved lists

risks.name: Confidentiality Breaches
risks.description: AttachmentHandler references internal docs in external replies
risks.mitigation: Vex confidentiality classifier blocking internal references

implementation.title: Intent Detection Module

implementation.title: Draft Generation Module
implementation.description: Generates context-aware email replies with tone control

implementation.title: Attachment Handler
implementation.description: Analyzes email attachments for relevance and sensitivity

vexIntegration.title: PII Filtering Wrapper

vexIntegration.title: Tone Appropriateness Check
Recipient + Confidentiality Guard
vexIntegration.description: Validates recipients and blocks confidential leaks

cta.heading: Secure Your DSPy AI Email Assistant
cta.description: Add Vex verification to your DSPy modules today to prevent PII leaks and compliance violations.
